title: Adventurer's Hell
description: A RPG-based content filled modpack, perfect for the true survivalist
body:
This modpack was not made for the weak.
This is a RPG based modpack designed to make Minecraft look like an entirely new game. From the loads of new biomes, structures, mobs, to the new weapons, wands, and foods you will be fun to have a blast playing on here. 

Mods included (It's a bit messy rn I plan on organizing it later)
